$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Claude model vocabulary (#2338). Consumed by: src/hooks/src/lib/cost-estimator.ts + src/hooks/src/subagent-start/model-cost-advisor.ts (esbuild-inlined JSON import), tests/agents/test-agent-frontmatter.sh, tests/agents/test-agent-model-field.sh, tests/skills/structure/test-model-id-vocab.sh, scripts/generate-docs-data.js. Add new models HERE, nowhere else. shortNames = agent frontmatter values; aliases = shortName -> current latest full ID per channel; fullIds = API-valid IDs allowed in agent frontmatter and skill docs; historicalIds = retired IDs that legitimately appear in migration/monitoring docs (allowed by the vocab lint, NOT valid for agent frontmatter); pricing = per-MTok USD. NOTE (2026-07-14): claude-fable-5 is GENERALLY AVAILABLE — Anthropic's frontier tier above Opus. The earlier 2026-06-12 export-control suspension was lifted; Fable stays fully in the vocab (shortName/alias/fullId) as an active model, so no structural demote is needed (#2435 closed not-planned — the trigger is dead). Premium pricing applies and it must NOT be auto-pinned to agents/sessions: the fable-spend-consent pretool gate (src/hooks/src/pretool/task/fable-spend-consent.ts) requires explicit user consent before any Fable spend. NOTE (2026-06-30): Sonnet 5 (claude-sonnet-5) adopted — `sonnet` alias advanced claude-sonnet-4-6 -> claude-sonnet-5; the prior ID stays in fullIds (still an active model). Pricing $3/$15 per MTok (cache 0.3/3.75) matches the Sonnet tier; intro $2/$10 through 2026-08-31 is NOT stamped (the durable sticker is used for stable cost reports). cost-estimator unknown-model fallback repointed sonnet-4-6 -> sonnet-5.
